base_annual_fee.source_clause: The Base Annual Fee payable by the Customer shall be INR 11,00,00,000 (Rupees Eleven Crores only) per annum, payable in monthly instalments of INR 91,66,667 (Rupees Ninety-One Lakhs Sixty-Six Thousand Six Hundred and Sixty-Seven only).

base_monthly_fee.source_clause: Monthly instalments of INR 91,66,667 payable on or before the 7th calendar day of each month.

escalation.source_clause: The Base Annual Fee shall be adjusted annually on July 1 of each year based on WPI All Commodities for January. Maximum escalation capped at 7% per annum, with a floor of 0% (no decrease).

variable_component.source_clause: Variable O&M charge of INR 0.035 per net kWh generated at grid connection, billed quarterly within 45 days of quarter close.

availability_guarantee_pct.source_clause: The Contractor guarantees minimum annual Wind Turbine Availability of 95.5%. Availability computed per IEC 61400-26 excluding Force Majeure and Grid Unavailability.

ld_rate_per_pp.source_clause: For each percentage point shortfall below 95.5% availability, LDs payable at 0.75% of Base Annual Fee per PP. Maximum LD capped at 12% of BAF.

ld_cap_pct.source_clause: Maximum LD liability shall not exceed 12% of the Base Annual Fee in any Contract Year.

bonus_threshold_pct.source_clause: Performance Bonus of 0.75% of BAF per PP above 97.5% availability. Bonus cap: 4% of BAF per annum.

bonus_rate_per_pp.source_clause: Performance Bonus rate of 0.75% of BAF per percentage point above the 97.5% bonus threshold.

payment_terms_days.source_clause: Payment due within 30 days of receipt of a valid tax invoice.

late_payment_interest.source_clause: Overdue amounts attract interest at SBI MCLR (1-year) + 1.5% per annum, calculated daily.

renewal_notice_months.source_clause: 9 months written notice required for termination or non-renewal.

validation_warnings: NOTE: Escalation effective date is July 1 (not April 1) — atypical for the sector.
MATH: 110000000 / 12 = 9166666.67, rounded to 9166667 — rounding convention documented.
